scenario_config.name: compat_v1_0_0_seed
scenario_config.premise: A surgeon in a rural hospital faces two critically ill patients and only enough medication for one. The hospital policy is strict first-come-first-served, but the second-arrival is a child with a reversible condition; the first is an elderly community elder whose illness is also treatable but less urgent. The community is watching, the policy is visible, and whichever decision is made will set a precedent that ripples through every similar case for years.

agents.name: Dr. Chen
agents.identity: I am a surgeon with twenty years of trauma experience and a deep respect for hospital protocol.
agents.goal: I want to save the most lives while upholding the hospital's stated rules.

agents.name: Nurse Patel
agents.identity: I am a senior nurse who has seen what happens when rules are bent quietly.
agents.goal: I want to protect vulnerable patients, especially children.

choices: I prioritize the child despite the policy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The medication can only save one patient. What does Dr. Chen do?
